overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through the ancient Greek village of Korinth at dusk. The scene features weathered stone buildings with tiled roofs, wooden market stalls with red fabric awnings, and atmospheric torch lighting against a deep blue twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between ancient stone houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street between stone buildings

entered.detail: weathered stone building with small windows and tiled roof
ancient stone structure with wooden door and shutters
wooden stall structure with red fabric awning and pottery displays
large clay jars stacked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street flanked by ancient stone houses. A wooden market stall with a red fabric awning is visible ahead, with pottery amphorae stacked on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village plaza with large tree and smoking kiln

events.description: a large olive tree comes into view in the center of the plaza
approaching a building with smoke rising from a stone kiln oven

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large central tree and a building with a smoking kiln

entered.detail: mature tree with thick trunk and spreading branches in the village center
stone structure with smoke rising from a chimney or kiln oven
wooden wheeled cart parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wide plaza dominated by a large olive tree. The character approaches a building with a smoking kiln on the left, while wooden carts and pottery stacks line the path. The sky is fully visible above the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage with wooden awning

events.description: entering a covered market area under a wooden awning that blocks the sky
exiting the covered awning back into the open street

agents.ego_description: passing through a covered market passage and emerging into open street

entered.detail: wooden beam structure with fabric roof covering the path
two-story stone house with wooden balcony on upper floor
tall thin evergreen trees visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker covered market passage under a wooden canopy, then emerges back into the open street. A two-story stone building with a wooden balcony appears on the right, while tall cypress trees become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with red ceremonial banners

events.description: passing under a large red fabric banner stretched across the street overhead
slowing approach as a figure holding a torch becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: approaching a figure standing in the street holding a torch

notable_agents.action: standing in the distance holding a lit torch

entered.detail: large red fabric banner stretched horizontally across the street between buildings
tall stone wall with cypress trees visible above it

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a medium-width street lined with stone houses, passing under a large red fabric banner stretched overhead. In the distance, a figure holding a torch stands in the path, and tall stone walls with cypress trees appear on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined residential alleyway into a wide, open village plaza at dusk. It begins by trailing the character along a narrow cobblestone street flanked by ancient stone houses and stacked pottery amphorae. As the character advances, the path leads toward a wooden market stall topped with a red fabric awning. The scene then expands as the street opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a large olive tree, revealing the deep blue twilight sky above. Finally, the camera passes a building with a smoking kiln on the left, moving past wooden carts and further pottery stacks that line the open square.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed market passage that opens into a wider, torch-lit street of an ancient Greek village. It begins as the character moves under a dark wooden canopy, emerging from the enclosure back into the open air where a two-story stone building with a wooden balcony stands to the right. As the character continues forward, the view expands to reveal tall cypress trees in the distance and a medium-width street lined with weathered stone houses. The scene then shifts beneath a large red fabric banner stretched overhead before turning toward a distant figure holding a torch who stands amidst tall stone walls and greenery.
